email:
Subject: AI/ML student looking for advice

Hi,

I hope you are doing well.

I recently came across your profile while exploring professionals working in software engineering and technology, and I wanted to reach out.

I am currently a third-year Computer Engineering student from SPPU with a strong interest in AI/ML, backend development, Generative AI, and modern software systems. Over the past few months, I have been consistently learning and improving my technical skills while also trying to understand how engineers grow within the software industry.

As a student, I strongly believe that learning from experienced professionals is one of the best ways to understand real industry expectations and build the right career path. That is why I wanted to connect with professionals who have valuable industry experience and strong technical backgrounds.

At present, I am actively exploring internship opportunities and continuously working on improving my technical knowledge, communication skills, and understanding of software engineering concepts.

If possible, I would truly appreciate any advice, guidance, or suggestions that could help me improve as a student and prepare better for opportunities in the software industry.

Thank you so much for your valuable time. I genuinely appreciate it.

Best regards,
Jagdish
